```{r}
#| include: false
# Point reticulate at the project venv (one level up from docs/) unless the
# environment already specifies a Python interpreter (e.g. RETICULATE_PYTHON
# in CI). Then dev-load the R wrapper from the source tree.
if (Sys.getenv("RETICULATE_PYTHON") == "") {
  venv <- normalizePath("../.venv", mustWork = FALSE)
  if (dir.exists(venv)) reticulate::use_virtualenv(venv, required = TRUE)
}
suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all("../r/rieszboost", quiet = TRUE))
```
